title: The garden center — untouched
premise: Evolution BEFORE: a quiet, unlooted place.

stages.narration: Rows of dead houseplants sag in the greenhouse, but the shelves past them still hold seed packets, twine, tinned goods someone stocked and never came back for. A couple of shapes drift in the parking lot beyond the fence — slow, unbothered, for now.

choices.label: Slip in through the loading door and look around
Not worth the noise — move on

notes: Entering (enc.gc.entered) opens the DURING beat; skipping consumes the one-shot.
